description: TD-01: ALTER TABLE adds bio column, predicate checks existing username column

migrations.name: add_bio
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bio TEXT;

rationale: Migration adds new column but predicate checks existing column — should still exist

description: TD-01: ALTER TABLE adds bio column, predicate checks for bio column

migrations.name: add_bio
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bio TEXT;

rationale: After migration, new column should be visible — tests if gate refreshes schema

description: TD-01: ALTER TABLE renames posts to articles, predicate checks posts still exists

migrations.name: rename_posts
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts RENAME TO articles;

rationale: Table renamed — stale pool might still see old name, but fresh introspection should not

description: TD-01: ALTER TABLE drops view_count from posts, predicate expects it

migrations.name: drop_viewcount
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts DROP COLUMN view_count;

rationale: Column dropped — predicate should detect absence even if pool cached old schema

description: TD-01 control: No migration, users table exists
rationale: No schema change — existing table should be found

description: TD-02: Migration adds avatar_url column, API /api/items has no avatar data

migrations.name: add_avatar
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN avatar_url TEXT;

rationale: Schema change added column but API layer not updated — stale response shape

description: TD-02: Migration adds published_at to posts, API has no reference to it

migrations.name: add_published_at
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN published_at TIMESTAMP;

rationale: Schema changed but API response format unchanged — DB/API shape mismatch

description: TD-03: Migration creates tags table, predicate checks it exists

migrations.name: create_tags
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE tags (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);

rationale: New table created — should be immediately visible after migration

description: TD-03: Migration creates audit_log table, check for action column

migrations.name: create_audit
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE audit_log (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, actor_id INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

rationale: New table + column should be visible immediately after CREATE TABLE

description: TD-03: No migration creates comments table, predicate expects it
rationale: Table never created — should not exist

description: TD-pure: Edit init.sql adds bio column, content predicate finds it

edits.replace:
email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    bio TEXT,

rationale: Edit adds column to init.sql — content gate should find it

description: TD-pure: Edit renames posts table, content check for old "CREATE TABLE posts"
rationale: Table renamed in init.sql — old name should not be found

description: TD-pure: Edit init.sql column name, server.js API has no reference
rationale: Column renamed in schema but server.js code references old name — DB/API desync

description: TD-pure: Edit init.sql adds CHECK constraint, config.json has no validation
rationale: Schema constraint added but config has no awareness — temporal gap between layers

description: TD-04: Add index on users.email, server.js has no indexed query

migrations.name: add_index
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);

rationale: Database index/constraint added but application code unaware

description: TD-04: Add index on posts.user_id, config.json has no index config

migrations.name: add_index
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_posts_user ON posts(user_id);

rationale: Database index/constraint added but application code unaware

description: TD-04: Add unique constraint on sessions.token, .env has no constraint reference

migrations.name: add_index
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE sessions ADD CONSTRAINT uniq_token UNIQUE(token);

rationale: Database index/constraint added but application code unaware

description: TD-04: Control: add index, verify in init.sql content

migrations.name: add_index
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_posts_title ON posts(title);

rationale: Database index/constraint added but application code unaware

description: TD-05: Change view_count from INTEGER to BIGINT, server.js unchanged

migrations.name: alter_type
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ALTER COLUMN view_count TYPE BIGINT;

rationale: Column type/constraint changed via migration but dependent code not updated

description: TD-05: Change username from VARCHAR(100) to TEXT, init.sql has old type

migrations.name: alter_type
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN username TYPE TEXT;

rationale: Column type/constraint changed via migration but dependent code not updated

description: TD-05: Add NOT NULL to posts.title, server.js has no validation

migrations.name: alter_type
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ALTER COLUMN title SET NOT NULL;

rationale: Column type/constraint changed via migration but dependent code not updated

description: TD-05: Add DEFAULT to users.created_at, config.json unaware

migrations.name: alter_type
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN created_at SET DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

rationale: Column type/constraint changed via migration but dependent code not updated

description: TD-05: Control: migration adds column, check init.sql for table name

migrations.name: alter_type
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN phone VARCHAR(20);

rationale: Column type/constraint changed via migration but dependent code not updated

description: TD-06: Two migrations: add column then index, check column exists

migrations.name: add_col
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bio TEXT;

migrations.name: add_idx
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_bio ON users(bio);

rationale: Multiple migrations applied but application layer not updated

description: TD-06: Two migrations: create table then populate, check server.js

migrations.name: create
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE tags (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));

migrations.name: seed
migrations.sql: INSERT INTO tags (name) VALUES ('important');

rationale: Multiple migrations applied but application layer not updated

description: TD-06: Control: two migrations, check init.sql still has users

migrations.name: m1
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN avatar TEXT;

migrations.name: m2
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN slug TEXT;

rationale: Multiple migrations applied but application layer not updated

description: TD-07: Add FK from posts.author_id → users.id, server.js has no join logic

migrations.name: add_fk
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ADD CONSTRAINT fk_author FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id);

rationale: Foreign key/constraint added but application code has no awareness

description: TD-07: Add cascade delete FK, config.json unaware of cascade

migrations.name: add_fk
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE sessions ADD CONSTRAINT fk_session_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

rationale: Foreign key/constraint added but application code has no awareness

description: TD-07: Add check constraint on view_count, server.js has no validation

migrations.name: add_fk
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ADD CONSTRAINT chk_views CHECK (view_count >= 0);

rationale: Foreign key/constraint added but application code has no awareness

description: TD-07: Control: add FK, verify init.sql still has both tables

migrations.name: add_fk
migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE posts ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id);

rationale: Foreign key/constraint added but application code has no awareness
